challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with Basics of English (SVO order, Simple Present, Pronouns, Articles) in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज Basics of English (SVO order, Simple Present, Pronouns, Articles) का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: All 10 sentences are grammatically correct (SVO order followed)
Basics of English rule applied correctly in every sentence
At least 3 sentences use He/She/It + verb+s (Simple Present positive)
At least 2 sentences use don't/doesn't (Simple Present negative)
At least 1 sentence is a Do/Does question
At least 2 sentences correctly use a/an/the (Articles)
At least 1 sentence uses a possessive adjective (my/your/his/her/our/their)
Sentences were spoken aloud at least once, not just written
bonusChallenge: Record yourself speaking 5 of these sentences on your phone, play it back, and check your pronunciation and confidence. Then say them again — this time trying to sound 20% more confident than the first take.
stretchChallenge: Teach today's SVO rule and one Simple Present example to a friend or family member in under 2 minutes, using only English + simple Hindi support. If you can explain it, you have truly learned it.
reflectionPrompts: Aaj sabse mushkil kaunsa sentence banana laga aur kyun?
Kaunsa grammar rule sabse zyada naya/interesting laga?
Kal isi topic ko revise karne ke liye ek 2-line reminder likho.
